access_key_id.description: AWS access key id used to derive the AWS Signature Version 4 (SigV4) Authorization header. Never logged.

secret_access_key.description: AWS secret access key used to derive the SigV4 signing key HMAC chain. Never placed in a header or logged.

endpoint.description: DynamoDB JSON HTTP API endpoint, e.g. https://dynamodb.us-east-1.amazonaws.com. One of endpoint/base_url is required for live mode -- enforced by native/dynamodb's own Go config resolution (connection.go's resolveEndpoint), not this schema's required[] (JSON Schema's required[] cannot express an either-or pair).

base_url.description: Alias for endpoint, matching legacy's identical endpoint/base_url fallback. Ignored when endpoint is set.

region.description: AWS region used in the SigV4 credential scope (e.g. us-east-1) and, conventionally, the endpoint's own region.

table_name.description: DynamoDB table name to Scan. One of table_name/table is required for live mode -- enforced by native/dynamodb's own Go config resolution (reader.go's tableName), not this schema's required[].

table.description: Alias for table_name, matching legacy's identical table_name/table fallback. Ignored when table_name is set.

page_size.description: Scan Limit per page (a positive integer).

max_pages.description: Maximum Scan pages to request (a positive integer).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
